title: Sensorium Interface Descriptor v1
description: Immutable publication contract for one deliberately exposed Sensorium or Workbench projection.

interface/id.description: Stable resource identifier for this interface publication.

interface/name.description: Short operator-facing name; not an authority identifier.

publisher/node-ref.description: Node that owns publication and source-side policy.

output/schema-ref.description: Schema required for each data frame payload.

delivery/semantics.description: Whether the interface exposes one current snapshot or a bounded ordered event window.

access/modes.description: Operations that may be granted for this interface.

classification/max-tier.description: Most restrictive effective tier this interface accepts at egress.

classification/topic-class.description: Exact topic-class binding required for Interface declassification facts.

redaction/profile-ref.description: Optional source-owned redaction profile applied before frame creation.

limits.description: Hard publication ceilings further narrowed by callers and host policy.

frame/max-bytes.description: Maximum serialized bytes of one frame.

batch/max-frames.description: Maximum frames in one read result.

batch/max-bytes.description: Maximum serialized bytes of one complete read result.

lease/max-seconds.description: Maximum subscription lease granted at once.

replay/max-frames.description: Maximum retained ordered-event frames; forbidden for latest-state.

replay/max-seconds.description: Maximum ordered-event retention age; forbidden for latest-state.

overflow/policy.description: Explicit behavior when source state exceeds its delivery window.

expires/at.description: Hard end of the publication lifetime.
